Setup showing laparoscopic box trainer with Penrose drain model positioned on pink pad

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Instruments appear properly oriented for the task

frame_analyses.description: Needle loading being demonstrated with needle driver grasping the needle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper needle orientation at approximately 90 degrees to needle driver

Proper technique for forming initial throw

drain_assessment.assessment_note: This appears to be an instructional demonstration video rather than a complete timed performance

technique_summary: This video shows an educational demonstration of suturing techniques for the EMIG exam rather than a complete timed performance. The visible technique demonstrates proper needle handling and suture management principles.
improvement_suggestions: This appears to be instructional content rather than a performance to evaluate
strengths: Good demonstration of proper needle orientation
Clear educational presentation of technique principles
